description: A legal document or court order detailing the financial terms, frequency, and duration of spousal support or alimony payments.

first_name.instruction: First name of the spouse receiving alimony.

recipient_state.instruction: State of the recipient. Two-letter code.

payer_name.instruction: Full name of the spouse ordered to make alimony payments.

case_number.instruction: Court case or child support enforcement case number.

court_name.instruction: Name of the court, county, or state jurisdiction that issued the decree.

order_date.instruction: Date the court order was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.

payment_amount.instruction: Recurring dollar amount ordered for spousal support per payment cycle.

payment_frequency.instruction: Recurring schedule of the payments, such as Monthly or Bi-Weekly.

payment_type.instruction: Type of support: Alimony, Child Support, or both.

effective_start_date.instruction: Date payments are ordered to begin. YYYY-MM-DD format.

effective_end_date.instruction: Date payments are ordered to end, if specified. YYYY-MM-DD format.
